phase_name: Sessions 29-30 COMPLETE — all paths mapped to RH core
what_we_proved: rank(M) <= 2*N(bandwidth) + O(1) from Mellin decay + zero counting
Gap 2 closed: Connes 2026 simple+even theorem + our numerical verification
eps_0 = Signal(+) + Null(+) + Cross(-) with Signal = Null exactly
Q_W positive-definite verified lambda^2 = 10..5000 at 120 digits
what_we_discovered: rank(M) = bandwidth (NOT in any Connes paper)
W02 lies entirely in signal subspace of M (null projection < 10^{-10})
The three-way cancellation mechanism (Signal + Null + Cross)
s_even tracks mu_max with constant gap ~0.03, relative gap ~1/L^2
the_irreducible_core: Proving eps_0 -> 0 IS proving RH. Every approach (Connes Q_W, prolate operator, de Bruijn-Newman) terminates at this same wall. The last step requires connecting spectral theory to prime arithmetic without assuming what we're proving.

alternate_operators_tested.prolate: Zeta-free definition, but correct self-adjoint extension needs Heun equation. Simple discretization fails. Deficiency indices (4,4).
alternate_operators_tested.de_bruijn_newman: Clean dynamics: zeros converge linearly |z_t - gamma| ~ 1.16*t. No complex zeros at t=0.01. Lambda = 0 consistent but unproved.
